author.name: Frozen Over The Moon
author.tagline: Author of The Wandering Fairy, a LitRPG world-hopping fantasy about forbidden knowledge, soul weapons, and strange realms.
author.shortBio: Frozen Over The Moon writes The Wandering Fairy, a Royal Road LitRPG about Soren, world-hopping mysteries, and power systems that keep getting stranger.
author.longBio: Replace this biography with the author's real story. This area is meant for a warm, first-person author note: why The Wandering Fairy exists, what kinds of worlds it explores, and where readers can follow future releases.

links.newsletterNote: Occasional updates only. No spam, no cursed chain letters.

projects.name: Full Novel
projects.note: The full story is planned for 10 volumes. The current published arc is Volume 4.
